title: Filiation; ordinary proceedings
doc_html:
§410. Filiation; ordinary proceedings

            A filiation action pursuant to Civil Code Article 197 shall be a civil action brought in an ordinary proceeding under Book II of the Code of Civil Procedure and may be instituted separately or cumulated in a succession proceeding. However, the mere commencement of a succession proceeding under Book VI of the Code of Civil Procedure shall not constitute the instituting of a filiation action for purposes of Civil Code Article 197.

            Acts 2024, No. 96, §1.
doc_text:
§410.  Filiation; ordinary proceedings
A filiation action pursuant to Civil Code Article 197 shall be a civil action brought
in an ordinary proceeding under Book II of the Code of Civil Procedure and may be instituted
separately or cumulated in a succession proceeding.  However, the mere commencement of
a succession proceeding under Book VI of the Code of Civil Procedure shall not constitute
the instituting of a filiation action for purposes of Civil Code Article 197.
Acts 2024, No. 96, §1.
